On.Terms: ActorCreation; ValidateUnit IsFlying; Option Shadow Low; $AllowBlobShadow
ActorCreation; ValidateUnit IsNotFlying; Option Shadow Low; $AllowBlobShadow
FlyerHelperChange; FlyerHelper Selected; HasStatus FlyerHelper; !ScopeContains FlyerHelperSplat
FlyerHelperChange; FlyerHelper All; ValidateUnit IsFlying; !ScopeContains FlyerHelperSplat
TimerExpired; TimerName Shadow; IsStatus ShadowCreate 1; !Option Model Low
TimerExpired; TimerName Shadow; IsStatus ShadowCreate 1; !Option Model Low
TimerExpired; TimerName Shadow; IsStatus ShadowCreate 1; !Option Model Low
TimerExpired; TimerName Shadow; IsStatus ShadowCreate 1; !Option Model Low
AbilMorph.*.Start; MorphFrom CRPGOutpost; MorphTo CRPGOutpostFlying; ScopeContains GroundLocalSelection
AbilMorph.*.Start; MorphFrom CRPGOutpostFlying; MorphTo CRPGOutpost; ScopeContains FlyerHelperSplat; HasStatus FlyerHelper

On.Send: AnimBracketStart Morph Morph,Start Morph,Stand Morph,End Instant
